patches.hypothesis: The method incorrectly allows collapsing when a function assigned to a property is also used to access child properties, which prevents correct reference tracking of the alias.
patches.changes: - if (type == Type.FUNCTION || aliasingGets == 0) + if (type != Type.FUNCTION && aliasingGets == 0)
patches.diff: - if (type == Type.FUNCTION || aliasingGets == 0) + if (type != Type.FUNCTION && aliasingGets == 0)

patches.hypothesis: The method does not correctly handle cases where a function is assigned using operators or within complex statements like comma operator, leading to collapsing errors.
patches.changes: - Modify check conditions to prevent collapsing when a twin reference in assignment is involved.
patches.diff: - Modify check conditions to prevent collapsing when a twin reference in assignment is involved.
